intro: Cervaria oreoselinum, also known as Oenanthe crocata, is a perennial aquatic plant commonly found in Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including the treatment of digestive issues, such as bloating and indigestion, as well as its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in the management of wounds and skin conditions.
